system.description:
Knowledge of gods and demons – and the ways to worship them. In some settings, this skill may grant certain supernatural abilities.
  • Making a theological argument against a heretic: Religion/EDU 8+
  • Correctly identifying a demon's name from a list of ancient runes: Religion/EDU 12+
  • Understanding a newly encountered barbarian tribe's theology: Religion/INT 8+
  • Some Referees may permit characters to use the Religion skill to intimidate sentient undead creatures
system.shortdescr: Knowledge of gods, demons, and worship; may grant supernatural abilities.
